segment.source: Hero with eyebrow line, large headline, subheadline, one primary button, and a trust strip listing customer or partner names as styled text (no logo image uploads). Use it for: homepage or landing openers whose source leads with trusted-by claims, client rosters, or partner references beside the pitch. Prefer 'Logo Cloud', 'Logo Grid', or 'Logo Carousel' for standalone image-logo sections; 'SaaS Hero' when a dashboard screenshot is also available.
